latin: Quinque discipuli opus commune habebant. primus se occupatum esse dixit. secundus aegrotabat. tertius et quartus evanuerunt. unus omnia solus fecit et nomen omnium in opere scripsit.

questions.prompt: How many students actually did the work?
What excuses did the others give?
questions.target: Busy, sick, or they just vanished
choices: Busy, sick, or they just vanished

translation: Five students had a group project. The first said he was busy. The second was sick. The third and fourth vanished. One person did everything alone and wrote everyone's name on the work.
